case_title: TURNER, DYANNA VS 7 ELEVEN, INC. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,000.00 FILED BY TURNER, DYANNA AS TO DEFENDANT 7 ELEVEN, INC. FONG, TERRY W. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-15-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF FEES AND COSTS GRANTED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SIGNED SENT TO CORP. SERVICE CO. LAWYERS INC. AGT FOR 7 ELEVEN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUN-15-2007, CONTINUED BY COURT TO AUG-17-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM SHALL BE AMENDED TO ADD THE FOLLOWING DEFENDANTS: TERRY W. FONG & BETSY FONG DBA 7-11 STORE NO.20473. PLAINTIFF SHALL EFFECT TIMELY SERVICE OF HER CLAIM ON THESE DEFENDANTS
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF AS TO DEFENDANT 7 ELEVEN, INC.
AMENDED COMPLAINT FILED. TO ADD THE OTHER DEFT. TERRY W. FONG & BETSY FONG DBA 7-11 STORE #20473.
TRIAL RESET TO SEP-28-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF AUG-17-2007 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TURNER, DYANNA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FONG, TERRY W. $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,500.00, DEFENDANT TERRY FONG APPEARED PERSONALLY AT TRIAL AND WAIVED SERVICE OF PROCESS. DEFENDANT BETSY FONG, DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT RETURNED SENT TO TERRY FONG.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-01-2007 ORDERED DESTROYED
